plan_kts:
fun plan(workspacePath: String, baseRef: String, headRef: String): EvidenceResult {
    val repoContextReadme = readFile(".repo_context/README.md")
    val repoContextIndex = readFile(".repo_context/index.md")
    val repoContextMaintenance = readFile(".repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val repoIndex = readFile(".repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile(".repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val taskBrief = readFile("/tmp/gh-aw/agent/task.md")
    val implementationPlan = readFile("/tmp/gh-aw/agent/plan.md")
    val prDiff = gitDiff(base = baseRef, head = headRef)
    val changedFiles = extractChangedFiles(prDiff)
    val relevantModuleContext = selectRelevantRepoContext(changedFiles, repoContextIndex, repoIndex)
    val changedSource = readFiles(changedFiles)
    val planSteps = extractPlanSteps(implementationPlan)
    val diffFacts = summarizeDiff(prDiff, changedSource)
    val mappedSteps = mapPlanStepsToChangedCode(planSteps, diffFacts, relevantModuleContext)
    val missingOrDivergentSteps = findUnimplementedPlanSteps(planSteps, mappedSteps)
    val extraBehavior = identifyUnplannedBehavior(diffFacts, planSteps)
    val riskAssessment = assessInfraRisks(mappedSteps, missingOrDivergentSteps, extraBehavior, engineeringPrinciples)
    val verdict = decideCodeImplementsPlan(mappedSteps, missingOrDivergentSteps, extraBehavior, riskAssessment)
    val evidence = buildEvidenceReport(verdict, mappedSteps, missingOrDivergentSteps, extraBehavior, riskAssessment)
    return makeResult(evidence)
}
